Unpopular opinion: most people build OpenClaw agents backwards.

They dump every skill and integration they can find, then wonder why the output is jumbled and unreliable.

Start with ONE goal. If a skill or integration doesn't help with achieving that goal don't add it.

Everyone is building Jarvis but each Jarvis has a different home.

1) On your computer (Openclaw)
2) On ephemeral computers (Manus)
3) On a rented computer (any hosting platform for Openclaw)
